title: Standardness Policy
description: Node relay and mempool policy rules that constrain which valid transactions are considered standard.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.notes: How standardness rules affect mempool admission and relay.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Hardcoded Consensus Values
resources.notes: Useful contrast between immutable consensus limits and node policy.
